task_completion.description: Verify an Observation log is created and dated November 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log entry of type 'Observation' in the farmOS Field Kit interface with the date explicitly set to November 15, 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the Observation log contains the required pest infestation notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text in the Observation log's notes field: 'Aphid infestation observed on soybean crop in Field B, Rows 12-18. Estimated 30% of plants affected with moderate colony density on leaf undersides. Species appears to be soybean aphid (Aphis glycines). Recommend immediate treatment.'

task_completion.description: Verify an Input log is created and dated November 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log entry of type 'Input' in the farmOS Field Kit interface with the date explicitly set to November 15, 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the Input log specifies a quantity of 12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the number '12' entered in the quantity field of the Input log.

task_completion.description: Verify the Input log specifies the unit as liters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the word 'liters' (or its standard abbreviation if applicable) entered or selected in the unit field of the Input log.

task_completion.description: Verify the Input log contains the required treatment application notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text in the Input log's notes field: 'Applied organic neem oil spray to soybean Field B, Rows 12-18 in response to aphid infestation. Concentration: 2% solution at 4 liters per acre using backpack sprayer. Weather: 72F, wind calm, no rain forecast 48hrs.'

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the farmOS Field Kit graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the farmOS Field Kit web or app interface being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the text was entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The notes, dates, quantities, and units should be visible inside the proper input fields or saved log views of farmOS Field Kit, not just written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verifies the logs are actually created and saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The logs should appear in a list of saved logs or show a successful save confirmation, rather than just being partially filled out in an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two farmOS Field Kit logs: an Observation log and an Input log. Both must be dated November 15, 2024. Observation notes must mention 'Aphid', 'soybean', 'Field B', and 'Aphis glycines'. Input notes must mention 'neem oil', '2%', and 'backpack sprayer'. Input quantity must be 12 and unit must be liters. These details are verified as factually consistent with real-world agricultural practices (e.g., 2% neem oil is appropriate for active aphid infestations, backpack sprayers are standard equipment, and liters are a standard unit compatible with farmOS).
